summary: Independent QA accepts R3. The branch stays inside the task's allowed client/test/project-message scope, with no protocol, sim-core, save-format, content-source, gate, roadmap, tools, CI, manifest, dependency, secret, server, telemetry, cloud-save, mod, or manual-node-battle scope drift. The default player shell now enters createBootstrappedShellSnapshot -> createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot -> createM7TopologyReadModelFixture/projectM7TopologyClientReadModels, not the legacy M2 grid fixture. Browser Pixi route-node anchors render from MapAnchorRenderInstruction/read-model data and are visual-only. Screenshots show irregular district polygons, visible route-node dots, explicit route 24, legend/context affordances, and no rectangular, hex, or regular lattice board. The perturbation regression mutates topology DTO polygon geometry and reprojects through projectM7TopologyClientReadModels while asserting unchanged route/path/reason invariants. District 1 obligation entry, route preview/reason copy, and map/task/inspector/route-queue synchronization remain covered and passing.

tests_run.notes: Dirty/untracked paths are limited to allowed apps/web, packages/client-core, packages/map-renderer, packages/ui, tests, project task/state/message paths, and this QA handoff. Two old M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION screenshots were regenerated by Playwright during QA and restored to HEAD because they are not this task's evidence.

1 file, 9 tests passed. Coverage includes topology polygons, anchor count, explicit route 24, visual-neighbor/no-route, visually-distant explicit route, capacity/blocked reasons, variable degrees/dead ends/chokepoints/modes, DTO perturbation re-projection, and no sim-core/WorldState import.

1 file, 11 tests passed. Coverage includes default topology snapshot, no M2 prototype default copy, topology hash/source count, edge sequence reason copy, no-known and blocked path preview copy, and Pixi anchor layer rebuild.
Vite production build succeeded with existing chunk-size warning only.
Storybook build succeeded with existing Vite chunk-size/plugin timing warnings only.

30 Chromium tests passed. Coverage includes District 1 obligation handling entry, map/task/list/inspector synchronization, topology path preview reason copy, browser canvas data-anchor-count=8, data-route-count=1, data-route-source-count=25, screenshot generation at 1440x900 and 1280x720, localization, console cleanliness, and no secret/key rows.
format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed. Architecture self-test produced 15 expected violations.

No diffs under packages/protocol, packages/sim-core, packages/save-format, packages/platform-electron, apps/desktop, content-source, .github, tools, docs/GATE-M7.md, docs/11-roadmap.md, docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md, MANIFEST.md, SHA256SUMS.txt, or VALIDATION_REPORT.md.

evidence_reviewed.notes: Manual image inspection shows irregular districts, route-node markers, explicit route line, legend, District 1 obligation context/action, and no rectangular, hex, or regular lattice board.
Manual image inspection shows the same topology semantics at the smaller required viewport and is not a bottom-sliver or stale evidence capture.

risks.risk: Only route 24 has drawable route-node-to-route-node geometry in the accepted DTO surface.
risks.assessment: Accepted for this client task. The client correctly avoids centroid, bounding-box, nearest-neighbor, visual-adjacency, grid, hex, or lattice line synthesis. Future full-route visualization should be a protocol/read-model task with explicit per-edge polylines.

risks.risk: Route-node markers are low-fidelity visual dots.
risks.assessment: Accepted for M7 topology recovery; this task is not final art production.

risks.risk: Legacy M2 fixture code remains for non-default tests and fixtures.
risks.assessment: Accepted because the default player path no longer calls it and tests assert topology hash, 14 districts, 25 topology route sources, no M2 default copy, and data-player-grid=not-used.

requested_action: Lead orchestrator may integrate/close M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 after normal branch/CI handling. Do not start M7 exit/content-lock reconsideration until the remaining topology validation task closes per ADR-010.
